message.content:
To determine if the model (the first image) appears in the pattern (the second image), we need to look for the exact shape and orientation of the model within the pattern.

1. The model is a right-angled shape with one horizontal line and one diagonal line meeting at a vertex.
2. In the pattern, we can see a similar right-angled shape in the top-left corner of the pattern. The orientation and structure match the model exactly.

Thus, the model appears in the pattern.
